diagram_title: Webapp Registry Gateway — GRAFCET State Machine

steps.name: Idle
steps.description: Gateway epoll loop waiting for events

steps.name: Accumulating Headers
steps.description: Reading TCP segments into PendingRequest buffer until \r\n\r\n

steps.name: Route Matching
steps.description: Parsing request and checking against web route table

actions.description: Parse method, path, cookie from raw headers

steps.name: Public Proxy Setup
steps.description: Establishing TCP connection to matched backend and setting up splice pipes

steps.name: Splice Proxying
steps.description: Bidirectional zero-copy forwarding between client and backend

actions.description: splice(client → pipe → backend) on EPOLLIN client
splice(backend → pipe → client) on EPOLLIN backend

steps.name: Auth Flow
steps.description: No public route matched; proceeding with JWT/PAM authentication

steps.name: Error Response
steps.description: Backend connection failed; sending 502 and closing client

steps.name: Route Reload
steps.description: SIGHUP received; reloading route table from disk

transitions.condition: New TCP connection accepted (EPOLLIN on listen_fd)
EOF or error on either fd → close_conn()
Error response sent and fd closed
